title: GitHub - mathigatti/telegram-ai-secretary: Self-hosted AI notification filter for Telegram that sends only important alerts via ntfy
excerpt: Self-hosted AI notification filter for Telegram that sends only important alerts via ntfy - mathigatti/telegram-ai-secretary
content_html:
Keep Telegram muted without missing what matters.

Telegram AI Secretary is a self-hosted AI notification filter for Telegram. It listens to a Telegram user account with Telethon, filters noisy chats, asks an LLM when context matters, and sends only important alerts to your phone through ntfy.

It is designed for people who want notifications off by default without missing urgent messages, calls, same-day plans, or someone waiting at the door.

Why?

Mobile phones keep us connected, but they have become so noisy that many people cannot keep notifications turned on. Turning them off solves the interruption problem, but creates a different one: checking the phone every few minutes "just in case" someone wrote something important.

That loop is bad for focus and makes the phone more addictive, not less.

Secretaries have long helped busy people stay reachable without personally processing every interruption. They filter irrelevant messages, understand context, and notify immediately when something actually needs attention. LLMs make a lightweight personal version of that possible for everyone.

Telegram AI Secretary is an experiment in that direction: keep the phone quiet by default, but still let important messages break through.

Use Cases

  • Keep Telegram muted while still receiving urgent DMs.
  • Get notified when someone asks "are you home?" or "can we meet today?"
  • Let calls and same-day coordination bypass do-not-disturb.
  • Ignore group chatter unless you are mentioned.
  • Send critical ntfy alerts when someone is waiting outside.
  • Use recent private-chat context so "I organized myself, I will pass by at 13" can be understood as important after a previous "please let me know".

Features

  • Listens to incoming Telegram messages and call events from a user account.
  • Drops noisy group messages unless they mention you.
  • Sends calls and matching fast rules directly to ntfy.
  • Sends private human messages to Claude with recent conversation context.
  • Keeps up to 20 messages from the current private conversation segment, where a segment is cut when consecutive messages are more than 24 hours apart.
  • Treats same-day coordination as notify-worthy, even when it is not an emergency.
  • Marks immediate physical-presence messages as candidates for critical alerts.
  • Supports temporary fast rules and do-not-disturb state from the CLI.
  • Ignores voice/audio messages by default, with optional DND auto-replies.

Requirements

  • Python 3.10+
  • A Telegram API ID and hash from https://my.telegram.org/apps
  • The claude CLI installed and authenticated
  • An ntfy topic, for example on https://ntfy.sh

Install

git clone https://github.com/mathigatti/telegram-ai-secretary.git
cd telegram-ai-secretary
python3 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
cp .env.example .env

Edit .env with your Telegram API credentials and ntfy topic.

Run the listener once interactively to create the Telethon session:

.venv/bin/python3 telegram_notification_listener.py

Telegram will ask for your phone login code the first time.

Run Manually

.venv/bin/python3 telegram_notification_listener.py

In another terminal you can test the decision agent:

echo '{"sender_name":"Alex","sender_is_bot":false,"is_private":true,"event_type":"message","text":"Are you home? I can stop by today"}' \
  | .venv/bin/python3 notification_agent.py --dry-run

systemd

Copy the template and edit the paths/user:

sudo cp systemd/telegram-ai-secretary-listener.service /etc/systemd/system/
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now telegram-ai-secretary-listener.service
systemctl status telegram-ai-secretary-listener.service --no-pager

The template assumes the app lives at /opt/telegram-ai-secretary; adjust it if you deploy elsewhere.

Fast Rules

Fast rules avoid model calls for obvious cases. They live in notification-agent/rules.json and can be managed with:

.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py list
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py dnd status
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py dnd on --duration 2h --reason "focus time"
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py dnd off
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py add --description "Notify on calls" --action notify --call --duration forever --urgency high --notification-text "{sender}: {event_label}"
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py add --description "Ignore group chatter for 2h" --action discard --condition-json '{"private": false}' --duration 2h
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py remove <rule_id>

Durations can be 30m, 2h, 1d, today, or forever.

Runtime Files

The app creates a local notification-agent/ directory containing:

  • rules.json: deterministic fast rules and DND state.
  • preferences.json: natural-language notification preferences.
  • preferences.events.jsonl: append-only preference/rule history.
  • decisions.jsonl: append-only decisions and model metadata.
  • conversations.jsonl: lightweight private-message history used for context.
  • audio_auto_replies.json: DND audio auto-reply cooldowns.

These files may contain private messages, names, Telegram IDs, and ntfy details. They are ignored by git.

How Decisions Work

  1. The listener receives a Telegram event and builds a trigger.
  2. The agent applies fast rules.
  3. If the trigger is a private human DM and no fast rule decides it, the agent includes recent conversation context in the Claude prompt.
  4. Claude returns JSON with notify, urgency, reason, notification_text, and confidence.
  5. If notify=true, the agent sends the text to ntfy.
flowchart LR
    A[Telegram user account] --> B[Telethon listener]
    B --> C[Fast rules]
    C -->|discard| D[No notification]
    C -->|notify| E[ntfy push]
    C -->|needs judgment| F[Claude with recent context]
    F -->|notify=true| E
    F -->|notify=false| D
Loading

Urgency maps to ntfy priority:

  • low -> low
  • normal -> default
  • high -> high
  • critical -> urgent

The actual phone sound is controlled by the ntfy app and your operating system's notification channel settings.

How Is This Different From A Telegram Forwarder?

Telegram AI Secretary is not a forwarding tool. It is an interruption filter. It does not try to copy every message somewhere else; it decides whether a message deserves to interrupt you.

Most Telegram forwarders are optimized for routing messages based on channels, keywords, or regular expressions. This project is optimized for personal attention management: direct messages, context, urgency, same-day coordination, and phone notification priority.

Privacy Notes

This app processes private Telegram messages locally and may send selected message contents to Claude and ntfy. Review the prompt in notification_agent.py and the data files in notification-agent/ before running it on sensitive accounts.

Related Ideas

Telegram AI Secretary sits near a few broader ideas and tools:

  • Secretary, the human role this tool is borrowing from.
  • Attention economy, the economic incentive behind many distracting interfaces.
  • Cognitive warfare, a more extreme framing of competition over perception and attention.
  • YIHAD CONTRA LAS CORPORACIONES DE LA DISTRACCION and its disciplina page.
  • Guia cyberciruja para la autodeterminacion digital.
  • News Feed Eradicator, a browser extension that removes automatic feeds from social networks so they behave more like tools you intentionally open and search.

Next Steps

  • Extend beyond Telegram.
  • Add email as another input.
  • Support multiple LLM providers.
  • Add a small web UI for reviewing decisions and tuning rules.
  • Improve critical notification channels for phone sounds that feel closer to a ringtone than a normal push notification.

blocks.html_en: Keep Telegram muted without missing what matters.

sentences.en: Keep Telegram muted without missing what matters.
sentences.zh: 让 Telegram 保持静音，以免错过重要内容。

blocks.html_en: Telegram AI Secretary is a self-hosted AI notification filter for Telegram. It listens to a Telegram user account with Telethon, filters noisy chats, asks an LLM when context matters, and sends only important alerts to your phone through ntfy.

sentences.en: Telegram AI Secretary is a self-hosted AI notification filter for Telegram.
sentences.zh: Telegram AI秘书是Telegram的自托管人工智能通知过滤器。

sentences.en: It listens to a Telegram user account with Telethon, filters noisy chats, asks an LLM when context matters, and sends only important alerts to your phone through ntfy.
sentences.zh: 它通过 Telethon 监听 Telegram 用户帐户，过滤嘈杂的聊天，在上下文重要时询问法学硕士，并通过 ntfy 仅向您的手机发送重要警报。

blocks.html_en: It is designed for people who want notifications off by default without missing urgent messages, calls, same-day plans, or someone waiting at the door.

sentences.en: It is designed for people who want notifications off by default without missing urgent messages, calls, same-day plans, or someone waiting at the door.
sentences.zh: 它专为那些希望默认关闭通知而不会错过紧急消息、电话、当天计划或在门口等候的人的用户而设计。

blocks.html_en: Why?

Mobile phones keep us connected, but they have become so noisy that many people cannot keep notifications turned on. Turning them off solves the interruption problem, but creates a different one: checking the phone every few minutes "just in case" someone wrote something important.

sentences.en: Mobile phones keep us connected, but they have become so noisy that many people cannot keep notifications turned on.
sentences.zh: 手机让我们保持联系，但它们变得如此嘈杂，以至于许多人无法保持通知打开状态。

sentences.en: Turning them off solves the interruption problem, but creates a different one: checking the phone every few minutes "just in case" someone wrote something important.
sentences.zh: 关闭它们可以解决中断问题，但会产生不同的问题：每隔几分钟检查一下手机，“以防万一”有人写了重要的东西。

blocks.html_en: That loop is bad for focus and makes the phone more addictive, not less.

sentences.en: That loop is bad for focus and makes the phone more addictive, not less.
sentences.zh: 这种循环不利于集中注意力，并且会让手机更容易上瘾，而不是更少。

blocks.html_en: Secretaries have long helped busy people stay reachable without personally processing every interruption. They filter irrelevant messages, understand context, and notify immediately when something actually needs attention. LLMs make a lightweight personal version of that possible for everyone.

sentences.en: Secretaries have long helped busy people stay reachable without personally processing every interruption.
sentences.zh: 长期以来，秘书们一直帮助忙碌的人们与他们保持联系，而无需亲自处理每一次打扰。

sentences.en: They filter irrelevant messages, understand context, and notify immediately when something actually needs attention.
sentences.zh: 他们过滤不相关的消息，了解上下文，并在确实需要注意的事情时立即发出通知。

sentences.en: LLMs make a lightweight personal version of that possible for everyone.
sentences.zh: 法学硕士为每个人提供了一个轻量级的个人版本。

blocks.html_en: Telegram AI Secretary is an experiment in that direction: keep the phone quiet by default, but still let important messages break through.

sentences.en: Telegram AI Secretary is an experiment in that direction: keep the phone quiet by default, but still let important messages break through.
sentences.zh: Telegram AI秘书就是朝这个方向进行的一项实验：默认保持手机安静，但仍然让重要消息突破。

blocks.html_en: Use Cases

sentences.en: Use Cases
sentences.zh: 使用案例

blocks.html_en: • Keep Telegram muted while still receiving urgent DMs.

sentences.en: Keep Telegram muted while still receiving urgent DMs.
sentences.zh: 在仍接收紧急 DM 的同时保持 Telegram 静音。

blocks.html_en: • Get notified when someone asks "are you home?" or "can we meet today?"

sentences.en: Get notified when someone asks "are you home?"
sentences.zh: 当有人问“你在家吗？”时收到通知

sentences.en: or "can we meet today?"
sentences.zh: 或“我们今天可以见面吗？”

blocks.html_en: • Let calls and same-day coordination bypass do-not-disturb.

sentences.en: Let calls and same-day coordination bypass do-not-disturb.
sentences.zh: 让通话和当日协调绕过勿扰模式。

blocks.html_en: • Ignore group chatter unless you are mentioned.

sentences.en: Ignore group chatter unless you are mentioned.
sentences.zh: 除非有人提到你，否则请忽略小组讨论。

blocks.html_en: • Send critical ntfy alerts when someone is waiting outside.

sentences.en: Send critical ntfy alerts when someone is waiting outside.
sentences.zh: 当有人在外面等待时发送关键 ntfy 警报。

blocks.html_en: • Use recent private-chat context so "I organized myself, I will pass by at 13" can be understood as important after a previous "please let me know".

sentences.en: Use recent private-chat context so "I organized myself, I will pass by at 13" can be understood as important after a previous "please let me know".
sentences.zh: 使用最近的私人聊天上下文，这样“我自己组织的，我会在 13 点路过”可以被理解为在之前的“请告诉我”之后很重要。

blocks.html_en: Features

sentences.en: Features
sentences.zh: 特征

blocks.html_en: • Listens to incoming Telegram messages and call events from a user account.

sentences.en: Listens to incoming Telegram messages and call events from a user account.
sentences.zh: 监听来自用户帐户的传入 Telegram 消息和呼叫事件。

blocks.html_en: • Drops noisy group messages unless they mention you.

sentences.en: Drops noisy group messages unless they mention you.
sentences.zh: 除非他们提到你，否则会丢弃吵闹的群组消息。

blocks.html_en: • Sends calls and matching fast rules directly to ntfy.

sentences.en: Sends calls and matching fast rules directly to ntfy.
sentences.zh: 将呼叫和匹配快速规则直接发送到 ntfy。

blocks.html_en: • Sends private human messages to Claude with recent conversation context.

sentences.en: Sends private human messages to Claude with recent conversation context.
sentences.zh: 向 Claude 发送包含最近对话背景的私人人类消息。

blocks.html_en: • Keeps up to 20 messages from the current private conversation segment, where a segment is cut when consecutive messages are more than 24 hours apart.

sentences.en: Keeps up to 20 messages from the current private conversation segment, where a segment is cut when consecutive messages are more than 24 hours apart.
sentences.zh: 最多保留当前私人对话片段中的 20 条消息，当连续消息间隔超过 24 小时时，该片段将被剪切。

blocks.html_en: • Treats same-day coordination as notify-worthy, even when it is not an emergency.

sentences.en: Treats same-day coordination as notify-worthy, even when it is not an emergency.
sentences.zh: 即使不是紧急情况，也将当天的协调视为值得通知的。

blocks.html_en: • Marks immediate physical-presence messages as candidates for critical alerts.

sentences.en: Marks immediate physical-presence messages as candidates for critical alerts.
sentences.zh: 将即时物理存在消息标记为关键警报的候选者。

blocks.html_en: • Supports temporary fast rules and do-not-disturb state from the CLI.

sentences.en: Supports temporary fast rules and do-not-disturb state from the CLI.
sentences.zh: 支持 CLI 中的临时快速规则和请勿打扰状态。

blocks.html_en: • Ignores voice/audio messages by default, with optional DND auto-replies.

sentences.en: Ignores voice/audio messages by default, with optional DND auto-replies.
sentences.zh: 默认情况下忽略语音/音频消息，并可选择 DND 自动回复。

blocks.html_en: These files may contain private messages, names, Telegram IDs, and ntfy details. They are ignored by git.

sentences.en: These files may contain private messages, names, Telegram IDs, and ntfy details.
sentences.zh: 这些文件可能包含私人消息、姓名、电报 ID 和 ntfy 详细信息。

sentences.en: They are ignored by git.
sentences.zh: 它们被 git 忽略。

blocks.html_en: How Decisions Work

sentences.en: How Decisions Work
sentences.zh: 决策如何运作

blocks.html_en: • The listener receives a Telegram event and builds a trigger.

sentences.en: The listener receives a Telegram event and builds a trigger.
sentences.zh: 侦听器接收 Telegram 事件并构建触发器。

blocks.html_en: • The agent applies fast rules.

sentences.en: The agent applies fast rules.
sentences.zh: 代理应用快速规则。

blocks.html_en: • If the trigger is a private human DM and no fast rule decides it, the agent includes recent conversation context in the Claude prompt.

sentences.en: If the trigger is a private human DM and no fast rule decides it, the agent includes recent conversation context in the Claude prompt.
sentences.zh: 如果触发器是私人 DM 并且没有快速规则决定它，则代理会在 Claude 提示中包含最近的对话上下文。

blocks.html_en: • Claude returns JSON with notify, urgency, reason, notification_text, and confidence.

sentences.en: Claude returns JSON with notify, urgency, reason, notification_text, and confidence.
sentences.zh: Claude 返回包含通知、紧急程度、原因、通知文本和置信度的 JSON。

blocks.html_en: • If notify=true, the agent sends the text to ntfy.

sentences.en: If notify=true, the agent sends the text to ntfy.
sentences.zh: 如果notify=true，代理将文本发送到ntfy。

blocks.html_en: Urgency maps to ntfy priority:

sentences.en: Urgency maps to ntfy priority:
sentences.zh: 紧急程度映射到 ntfy 优先级：

blocks.html_en: • low -> low

sentences.en: low -> low
sentences.zh: 低 -> 低

blocks.html_en: • normal -> default

sentences.en: normal -> default
sentences.zh: 正常->默认

blocks.html_en: • high -> high

sentences.en: high -> high
sentences.zh: 高 -> 高

blocks.html_en: • critical -> urgent

sentences.en: critical -> urgent
sentences.zh: 关键 -> 紧急

blocks.html_en: The actual phone sound is controlled by the ntfy app and your operating system's notification channel settings.

sentences.en: The actual phone sound is controlled by the ntfy app and your operating system's notification channel settings.
sentences.zh: 实际的电话声音由 ntfy 应用程序和操作系统的通知通道设置控制。

blocks.html_en: How Is This Different From A Telegram Forwarder?

sentences.en: How Is This Different From A Telegram Forwarder?
sentences.zh: 这与电报转发器有何不同？

blocks.html_en: Telegram AI Secretary is not a forwarding tool. It is an interruption filter. It does not try to copy every message somewhere else; it decides whether a message deserves to interrupt you.

sentences.en: Telegram AI Secretary is not a forwarding tool.
sentences.zh: Telegram AI秘书不是转发工具。

sentences.en: It is an interruption filter.
sentences.zh: 它是一个中断滤波器。

sentences.en: It does not try to copy every message somewhere else; it decides whether a message deserves to interrupt you.
sentences.zh: 它不会尝试将每条消息复制到其他地方；它决定一条消息是否值得打扰您。

blocks.html_en: Most Telegram forwarders are optimized for routing messages based on channels, keywords, or regular expressions. This project is optimized for personal attention management: direct messages, context, urgency, same-day coordination, and phone notification priority.

sentences.en: Most Telegram forwarders are optimized for routing messages based on channels, keywords, or regular expressions.
sentences.zh: 大多数 Telegram 转发器都针对基于通道、关键字或正则表达式的路由消息进行了优化。

sentences.en: This project is optimized for personal attention management: direct messages, context, urgency, same-day coordination, and phone notification priority.
sentences.zh: 该项目针对个人注意力管理进行了优化：直接消息、上下文、紧急性、当天协调和电话通知优先级。

blocks.html_en: Privacy Notes

sentences.en: Privacy Notes
sentences.zh: 隐私说明

blocks.html_en: This app processes private Telegram messages locally and may send selected message contents to Claude and ntfy. Review the prompt in notification_agent.py and the data files in notification-agent/ before running it on sensitive accounts.

sentences.en: This app processes private Telegram messages locally and may send selected message contents to Claude and ntfy.
sentences.zh: 此应用程序在本地处理私人 Telegram 消息，并可能将选定的消息内容发送给 Claude 和 ntfy。

sentences.en: Review the prompt in notification_agent.py and the data files in notification-agent/ before running it on sensitive accounts.
sentences.zh: 在敏感帐户上运行之前，请检查 notification_agent.py 中的提示和 notification-agent/ 中的数据文件。

blocks.html_en: Related Ideas

sentences.en: Related Ideas
sentences.zh: 相关想法

blocks.html_en: Telegram AI Secretary sits near a few broader ideas and tools:

sentences.en: Telegram AI Secretary sits near a few broader ideas and tools:
sentences.zh: Telegram AI秘书靠近一些更广泛的想法和工具：

blocks.html_en: • Secretary, the human role this tool is borrowing from.

sentences.en: Secretary, the human role this tool is borrowing from.
sentences.zh: 秘书，这个工具借用了人类的角色。

blocks.html_en: • Attention economy, the economic incentive behind many distracting interfaces.

sentences.en: Attention economy, the economic incentive behind many distracting interfaces.
sentences.zh: 注意力经济，许多分散注意力的界面背后的经济激励。

blocks.html_en: • Cognitive warfare, a more extreme framing of competition over perception and attention.

sentences.en: Cognitive warfare, a more extreme framing of competition over perception and attention.
sentences.zh: 认知战，一种关于感知和注意力的更极端的竞争框架。

blocks.html_en: • YIHAD CONTRA LAS CORPORACIONES DE LA DISTRACCION and its disciplina page.

sentences.en: YIHAD CONTRA LAS CORPORACIONES DE LA DISTRACCION and its disciplina page.
sentences.zh: 反对分散注意力的公司的圣战及其纪律页面。

blocks.html_en: • Guia cyberciruja para la autodeterminacion digital.

sentences.en: Guia cyberciruja para la autodeterminacion digital.
sentences.zh: 数字自决的网络外科指南。

blocks.html_en: • News Feed Eradicator, a browser extension that removes automatic feeds from social networks so they behave more like tools you intentionally open and search.

sentences.en: News Feed Eradicator, a browser extension that removes automatic feeds from social networks so they behave more like tools you intentionally open and search.
sentences.zh: News Feed Eradicator，一个浏览器扩展程序，可以从社交网络中删除自动提要，使它们的行为更像您有意打开和搜索的工具。

blocks.html_en: Next Steps

sentences.en: Next Steps
sentences.zh: 下一步

blocks.html_en: • Extend beyond Telegram.

sentences.en: Extend beyond Telegram.
sentences.zh: 超越 Telegram。

sentences.en: Add email as another input.
sentences.zh: 添加电子邮件作为另一个输入。

sentences.en: Support multiple LLM providers.
sentences.zh: 支持多个 LLM 提供商。

sentences.en: Add a small web UI for reviewing decisions and tuning rules.
sentences.zh: 添加一个小型 Web UI 用于查看决策和调整规则。

blocks.html_en: • Improve critical notification channels for phone sounds that feel closer to a ringtone than a normal push notification.

sentences.en: Improve critical notification channels for phone sounds that feel closer to a ringtone than a normal push notification.
sentences.zh: 改进手机声音的关键通知通道，使其比普通推送通知更接近铃声。

content_html_zh:
让 Telegram 保持静音，以免错过重要内容。

Telegram AI秘书是Telegram的自托管人工智能通知过滤器。 它通过 Telethon 监听 Telegram 用户帐户，过滤嘈杂的聊天，在上下文重要时询问法学硕士，并通过 ntfy 仅向您的手机发送重要警报。

它专为那些希望默认关闭通知而不会错过紧急消息、电话、当天计划或在门口等候的人的用户而设计。

Why?

手机让我们保持联系，但它们变得如此嘈杂，以至于许多人无法保持通知打开状态。 关闭它们可以解决中断问题，但会产生不同的问题：每隔几分钟检查一下手机，“以防万一”有人写了重要的东西。

这种循环不利于集中注意力，并且会让手机更容易上瘾，而不是更少。

长期以来，秘书们一直帮助忙碌的人们与他们保持联系，而无需亲自处理每一次打扰。 他们过滤不相关的消息，了解上下文，并在确实需要注意的事情时立即发出通知。 法学硕士为每个人提供了一个轻量级的个人版本。

Telegram AI秘书就是朝这个方向进行的一项实验：默认保持手机安静，但仍然让重要消息突破。

使用案例

  • 在仍接收紧急 DM 的同时保持 Telegram 静音。
  • 当有人问“你在家吗？”时收到通知 或“我们今天可以见面吗？”
  • 让通话和当日协调绕过勿扰模式。
  • 除非有人提到你，否则请忽略小组讨论。
  • 当有人在外面等待时发送关键 ntfy 警报。
  • 使用最近的私人聊天上下文，这样“我自己组织的，我会在 13 点路过”可以被理解为在之前的“请告诉我”之后很重要。

特征

  • 监听来自用户帐户的传入 Telegram 消息和呼叫事件。
  • 除非他们提到你，否则会丢弃吵闹的群组消息。
  • 将呼叫和匹配快速规则直接发送到 ntfy。
  • 向 Claude 发送包含最近对话背景的私人人类消息。
  • 最多保留当前私人对话片段中的 20 条消息，当连续消息间隔超过 24 小时时，该片段将被剪切。
  • 即使不是紧急情况，也将当天的协调视为值得通知的。
  • 将即时物理存在消息标记为关键警报的候选者。
  • 支持 CLI 中的临时快速规则和请勿打扰状态。
  • 默认情况下忽略语音/音频消息，并可选择 DND 自动回复。

要求

  • Python 3.10+
  • 来自 https://my.telegram.org/apps 的 Telegram API ID 和哈希值
  • claude CLI 已安装并经过身份验证
  • ntfy 主题，例如 https://ntfy.sh

安装

git clone https://github.com/mathigatti/telegram-ai-secretary.git
cd telegram-ai-secretary
python3 -m venv .venv
.venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt
cp .env.example .env

使用您的 Telegram API 凭据和 ntfy 主题编辑 .env。

以交互方式运行一次侦听器以创建 Telethon 会话：

.venv/bin/python3 telegram_notification_listener.py

Telegram 首次会询问您的手机登录码。

手动运行

.venv/bin/python3 telegram_notification_listener.py

在另一个终端中，您可以测试决策代理：

echo '{"sender_name":"Alex","sender_is_bot":false,"is_private":true,"event_type":"message","text":"Are you home? I can stop by today"}' \
  | .venv/bin/python3 notification_agent.py --dry-run

系统

复制模板并编辑路径/用户：

sudo cp systemd/telegram-ai-secretary-listener.service /etc/systemd/system/
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable --now telegram-ai-secretary-listener.service
systemctl status telegram-ai-secretary-listener.service --no-pager

该模板假设应用程序位于 /opt/telegram-ai-secretary；如果您部署在其他地方，请调整它。

快速规则

快速规则避免了对明显情况的模型调用。 它们位于 notification-agent/rules.json 中，可以通过以下方式进行管理：

.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py list
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py dnd status
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py dnd on --duration 2h --reason "focus time"
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py dnd off
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py add --description "Notify on calls" --action notify --call --duration forever --urgency high --notification-text "{sender}: {event_label}"
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py add --description "Ignore group chatter for 2h" --action discard --condition-json '{"private": false}' --duration 2h
.venv/bin/python3 notification_rules.py remove <rule_id>

持续时间可以是 30m、2h、1d、今天或永远。

运行时文件

该应用程序创建一个本地 notification-agent/ 目录，其中包含：

  • rules.json：确定性快速规则和 DND 状态。
  • preferences.json：自然语言通知首选项。
  • preferences.events.jsonl：仅附加首选项/规则历史记录。
  • Decisions.jsonl：仅附加决策和模型元数据。
  • conversations.jsonl：用于上下文的轻量级私人消息历史记录。
  • audio_auto_replies.json：免打扰音频自动回复冷却时间。

这些文件可能包含私人消息、姓名、电报 ID 和 ntfy 详细信息。 它们被 git 忽略。

决策如何运作

  1. 侦听器接收 Telegram 事件并构建触发器。
  2. 代理应用快速规则。
  3. 如果触发器是私人 DM 并且没有快速规则决定它，则代理会在 Claude 提示中包含最近的对话上下文。
  4. Claude 返回包含通知、紧急程度、原因、通知文本和置信度的 JSON。
  5. 如果notify=true，代理将文本发送到ntfy。
flowchart LR
    A[Telegram user account] --> B[Telethon listener]
    B --> C[Fast rules]
    C -->|discard| D[No notification]
    C -->|notify| E[ntfy push]
    C -->|needs judgment| F[Claude with recent context]
    F -->|notify=true| E
    F -->|notify=false| D
Loading

紧急程度映射到 ntfy 优先级：

  • 低 -> 低
  • 正常->默认
  • 高 -> 高
  • 关键 -> 紧急

实际的电话声音由 ntfy 应用程序和操作系统的通知通道设置控制。

这与电报转发器有何不同？

Telegram AI秘书不是转发工具。 它是一个中断滤波器。 它不会尝试将每条消息复制到其他地方；它决定一条消息是否值得打扰您。

大多数 Telegram 转发器都针对基于通道、关键字或正则表达式的路由消息进行了优化。 该项目针对个人注意力管理进行了优化：直接消息、上下文、紧急性、当天协调和电话通知优先级。

隐私说明

此应用程序在本地处理私人 Telegram 消息，并可能将选定的消息内容发送给 Claude 和 ntfy。 在敏感帐户上运行之前，请检查 notification_agent.py 中的提示和 notification-agent/ 中的数据文件。

相关想法

Telegram AI秘书靠近一些更广泛的想法和工具：

  • 秘书，这个工具借用了人类的角色。
  • 注意力经济，许多分散注意力的界面背后的经济激励。
  • 认知战，一种关于感知和注意力的更极端的竞争框架。
  • 反对分散注意力的公司的圣战及其纪律页面。
  • 数字自决的网络外科指南。
  • News Feed Eradicator，一个浏览器扩展程序，可以从社交网络中删除自动提要，使它们的行为更像您有意打开和搜索的工具。

下一步

  • 超越 Telegram。
  • 添加电子邮件作为另一个输入。
  • 支持多个 LLM 提供商。
  • 添加一个小型 Web UI 用于查看决策和调整规则。
  • 改进手机声音的关键通知通道，使其比普通推送通知更接近铃声。
